English Module 4 | A1-A2 | Individual Exam Practice

Digital Worksheet: Reading, Mediation and Writing

Complete the tasks in English. Your answers are saved in this browser automatically. Use your own words and write clearly.

Part 1: Reading Part 2: Mediation and Personal Response Part 3: Writing Final checklist
Auto-save: ready

Before You Start

This is individual practice. It follows the exam structure: reading first, then explaining information, then writing a longer text.

You may use class texts, notes and a dictionary. Do not use AI or translation programs to write your answers.

Auto-save: Your answers are saved automatically in this browser. When you open this file again on the same computer, your work will come back. Use Clear My Answers only when you want to start again.

Part 1 - Reading Practice

Read carefully. Choose, write or select the best answer.

Task 1 - Put the Paragraphs in the Right Order

First paragraph: Hello students. Next week we will have an English practice day at school.

Task 2 - Multiple Choice

Read the text. Choose the answer that is NOT in the text.

Rosa works in a cafe three days a week. She goes to English class in the evening because she wants to speak better with customers. Rosa is friendly, but she feels nervous when she writes long texts.

What is NOT said in the text?

Task 3 - Choose from the List

Complete the text. Choose one word for each blank.

Ahmed wants a new (1) __________. He has experience from a (2) __________ in his home country. He is taking an English (3) __________ because he wants to (4) __________ for work in Norway.

Task 4 - Read a Poster

Healthy Week for Adult Students
Sleep 7-8 hours. Drink water. Go for a walk. Eat regular meals. Talk to a friend when you feel stressed.

What is the main idea of the poster?

Task 5 - Read a Table

Bus
Walk
Car
Bike
13 students
8 students
6 students
3 students

Part 2 - Mediation and Personal Response

Listen to the audio

Task 1 - True or False

Task 2

Write about 100-150 words. Read the text about Nadia again. Explain the main information in simple English. Then write your own opinion: Why can education be important for adults?

Plan: Who is the text about? What problem did she have? What helped her? What is your opinion?
Your answer0 words | target 100-150

Part 3 - Writing Practice

Choose ONE task. Write 120-180 words. Use paragraphs and sentence starters.

Your text0 words | target 120-180

Final Checklist

etItem(storageKey); if (!raw) { setSaveIndicator('Auto-save: ready', 'idle'); return; } try { const data = JSON.parse(raw); let restored = 0; fields.forEach((field, index) => { let key = fieldKey(field, index); if (!(key in data)) key = legacyFieldKey(field, index); if (!(key in data)) return; if (field.type === 'checkbox' || field.type === 'radio') { field.checked = Boolean(data[key]); } else { field.value = data[key]; } if (field.type === 'checkbox' || field.type === 'radio') { if (data[key]) restored++; } else if (String(data[key]).length > 0) { restored++; } }); if (restored > 0 && restoreBanner) { restoreBanner.hidden = false; restoreBanner.innerHTML = `Welcome back! Your previous answers have been loaded (${restored} fields). `; const hideBtn = document.getElementById('hide-restore'); if (hideBtn) hideBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { restoreBanner.hidden = true; }); setSaveIndicator(`Restored - last saved earlier`, 'restored'); } else { setSaveIndicator('Auto-save: ready', 'idle'); } } catch { localStorage.removeItem(storageKey); setSaveIndicator('Auto-save: ready', 'idle'); } } function reviewMissing() { const missing = []; const seenRadios = new Set(); requiredFields.forEach(field => { if (field.type === 'radio') { if (seenRadios.has(field.name)) return; seenRadios.add(field.name); if (!document.querySelector(`input[name="${field.name}"]:checked`)) { const area = field.closest('.task, section'); missing.push(area ? area.querySelector('h2, h3').textContent : field.name); } return; } if (!isComplete(field)) { const area = field.closest('.task, section'); missing.push(area ? area.querySelector('h2, h3').textContent : 'One answer'); } }); if (!missing.length) { statusMessage.textContent = 'All required areas have an answer.'; return; } statusMessage.textContent = `${missing.length} area(s) still need an answer. First: ${missing[0]}.`; const firstMissing = requiredFields.find(field => !isComplete(field)); if (firstMissing) firstMissing.closest('.task, section').scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' }); } function updateTimer() { const seconds = Math.floor((Date.now() - startedAt) / 1000); const minutes = String(Math.floor(seconds / 60)).padStart(2, '0'); const rest = String(seconds % 60).padStart(2, '0'); document.getElementById('timer').textContent = `${minutes}:${rest}`; } fields.forEach(field => { field.addEventListener('input', saveAnswers); field.addEventListener('change', saveAnswers); }); document.getElementById('review-btn').addEventListener('click', reviewMissing); document.getElementById('print-btn').addEventListener('click', () => window.print()); document.getElementById('clear-btn').addEventListener('click', () => { if (!confirm('Clear all answers on this worksheet?')) return; localStorage.removeItem(storageKey); fields.forEach(field => { if (field.type === 'checkbox' || field.type === 'radio') field.checked = false; else field.value = ''; }); statusMessage.textContent = 'Answers cleared.'; if (restoreBanner) restoreBanner.hidden = true; setSaveIndicator('Auto-save: ready', 'idle'); updateCounters(); updateProgress(); }); loadAnswers(); updateCounters(); updateProgress(); updateTimer(); setInterval(updateTimer, 1000);
